matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 10 > Itinerary > Day 10 > Budget Dinner at Tim Hortons

node.name: Budget Dinner at Tim Hortons
node.description: Casual and affordable dinner option at a popular Canadian fast-food chain. Known for coffee, donuts, and simple meals.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 10 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Ripley's Aquarium

node.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 10 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Royal Ontario Museum

node.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 10 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Pj O'Brien's

node.name: Pj O'Brien's
node.description: Enjoy live music at a cozy Irish pub with a vibrant atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 10 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

node.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
